---
title: "Projects"
---

This section showcases Python-based projects that demonstrate my ability to analyse data, interpret results, and communicate findings through code and visualisations.

::: {.callout-important}
Each project includes **executable Python code, structured analysis, and clear visual outputs**, reflecting practical data analysis skills.
:::

## My Projects

::: {.section-card}
### 📊 Student Performance Analysis

A Python project analysing the relationship between study time and academic performance.

**Key Features:**
- Data organisation using Pandas  
- Trend analysis and interpretation  
- Visualisation using Matplotlib  

**Tools:** Python, Pandas, Matplotlib  

[View Project →](list/project-1.html)
:::

::: {.section-card}
### 💰 Monthly Budget Analysis

A Python project analysing income and expenses to identify spending patterns and support financial decision-making.

**Key Features:**
- Structured financial data analysis  
- Visualisation of spending distribution  
- Interpretation of budget allocation  

**Tools:** Python, Pandas, Matplotlib  

[View Project →](list/project-2.html)
:::
